next_action: Ask exactly one concise A/B/C decision card selecting whether future co-op uses fully shared loot and currency, individually instanced rewards for each player, or a hybrid where ordinary rewards are personal while major authored rewards are shared or duplicated for everyone. Preserve the interconnected room map, dedicated banking rooms, provisional unsecured loot, stable per-run teleport shops, personal non-replenishable lives, spectator clutch play, host-continuity requirement, permanent individual progression, complete offline solo play, and post-MVP status of co-op. Include fairness, competition and griefing, duplicate weapon handling, banking and death-loss semantics, disconnected or spectating players, shop purchases, save ownership, balance, implementation complexity, and compatibility with later matchmaking. Put the recommendation after all A/B/C options at the end of the card. Queue D-181 through D-190 and persist at D-190 unless the user changes the batching rule or requests a context handoff.
